description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a desert camouflage finish, featuring a robust polymer stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle is equipped with a precision scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing its accuracy for long-range engagements. The handguard is textured and ventilated, likely for heat dissipation and improved grip, and the barrel is of medium length with a flash hider at the muzzle. The pistol grip and adjustable stock suggest ergonomic considerations for user comfort and control. Metal and polymer components are visible throughout, with metallic parts on the barrel, receiver, and magazine, and polymer on the stock and handguard. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for both durability and tactical performance in urban environments.
description: A modern, desert-camouflaged tactical rifle with a scope, detachable magazine, and ergonomic polymer stock and grip. Features a ventilated handguard and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the rifle, including the scope, magazine, textured handguard, and adjustable stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope, with the magazine partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the ejection port, magazine, and additional details of the handguard and stock.
